ddls:
CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client organization */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the client */,
  "signup_date" TEXT /* Date when the client signed up */,
  "subscription_plan" TEXT /* Type of subscription plan the client is on */,
  "client_website_count" INTEGER /* Number of websites the client has added to the platform */,
  "client_active_status" TEXT /* Status of the client's account */,
  "client_revenue" REAL /* Revenue generated from the client's subscription */,
  "client_last_activity" TEXT /* Date of the last activity by the client on the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "websites" (
  "website_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each website */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated client */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the website */,
  "website_name" TEXT /* Name of the website */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date when the website was added */,
  "website_status" TEXT /* Status of the website */,
  "website_traffic_trend" TEXT /* Trend of traffic */,
  "website_alexa_rank" INTEGER /* Alexa rank of the website */,
  "website_last_analysis_date" TEXT /* Date of the last traffic analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("website_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_websites_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traffic_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each traffic source */,
  "traffic_source" TEXT /* Name of the traffic source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the source */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the traffic source */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the traffic source */,
  "source_reliability_score" REAL /* Reliability score of the traffic source */,
  "source_active_status" TEXT /* Status of the traffic source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traffic_data" (
  "traffic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each traffic record */,
  "website_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the website that the traffic data pertains to */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the traffic source */,
  "global_rank" TEXT /* Global ranking of the website */,
  "traffic_share" REAL /* Percentage share of traffic from this source */,
  "change" REAL /* Change in traffic share from the previous period */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date when the traffic data was recorded */,
  "traffic_page_views" INTEGER /* Number of page views */,
  "traffic_bounce_rate" REAL /* Bounce rate of the traffic */,
  "traffic_session_duration" REAL /* Average session duration */,
  "traffic_conversion_rate" REAL /* Conversion rate of the traffic */,
  "traffic_device_type" TEXT /* Type of device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("traffic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traffic_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES traffic_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traffic_data_website_id FOREIGN KEY ("website_id") REFERENCES websites ("website_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role */,
  "role_default" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if this is a default role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the client the user belongs to */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for authentication */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  "user_last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "user_active_status" TEXT /* Status of the user account */,
  "user_last_activity" TEXT /* Date of the last activity by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "website_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the website the report is associated with */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report */,
  "date_created" TEXT /* Date when the report was created */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data contained in the report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report */,
  "report_last_modified" TEXT /* Date of the last modification to the report */,
  "report_generated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who generated the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_report_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("report_generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_website_id FOREIGN KEY ("website_id") REFERENCES websites ("website_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each settings record */,
  "website_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the website */,
  "tracking_code" TEXT /* Tracking code used for analytics */,
  "data_retention_period" INTEGER /* Duration in days for data retention */,
  "setting_active_status" TEXT /* Status of the analytics settings */,
  "setting_last_modified" TEXT /* Date of the last modification to the settings */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traffic_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the traffic category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "category_active_status" TEXT /* Status of the traffic category */,
  "category_last_modified" TEXT /* Date of the last modification to the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traffic_share_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history record */,
  "traffic_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the traffic data */,
  "traffic_share" REAL /* Percentage share of traffic at this date */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date when this record was created */,
  "history_active_status" TEXT /* Status of the history record */,
  "history_last_modified" TEXT /* Date of the last modification to the history record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traffic_share_history_traffic_id FOREIGN KEY ("traffic_id") REFERENCES traffic_data ("traffic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "client_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback record */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the client providing feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback provided by the client */,
  "date_submitted" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was submitted */,
  "feedback_status" TEXT /* Status of the feedback */,
  "feedback_resolved_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who resolved the feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_client_feedback_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_client_feedback_feedback_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("feedback_resolved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "website_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the website the alert is associated with */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value that triggers the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert */,
  "date_created" TEXT /* Date when the alert was created */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert */,
  "alert_resolved_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who resolved the alert */,
  "alert_last_triggered" TEXT /* Date of the last time the alert was triggered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_website_id FOREIGN KEY ("website_id") REFERENCES websites ("website_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_alert_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("alert_resolved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "api_integrations" (
  "integration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each API integration */,
  "website_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the website for which the integration exists */,
  "api_name" TEXT /* Name of the API service */,
  "integration_status" TEXT /* Current status of the integration */,
  "integration_active_status" TEXT /* Status of the integration */,
  "integration_last_sync" TEXT /* Date of the last successful sync with the API */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("integration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_api_integrations_website_id FOREIGN KEY ("website_id") REFERENCES websites ("website_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "date_sent" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the notification has been read */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of the notification */,
  "notification_status" TEXT /* Status of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
